testcase.name: test_create_fiche_with_step_currencies

failure.message: assert None == 'GNF' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc4178b09280>('fees_currency') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc4178b09280> = {'description': 'Deposer le dossier complet au consulat', 'documents': [{'name': 'Passeport valide', 'note': '6 mois de validite minimum', 'required': True}, {'name': "Photos d'identite", 'note': 'Format 4x5', 'required': True}], 'duration': '1 jour', 'fees': 100000.0, ...}.get
